landing.heroSub2: for individual developers and enterprise teams. No more downtime or vendor risk — focus on building.
landing.featuresSub: Real solutions to real Claude API integration problems
landing.feat1Desc: Direct connection to Anthropic's official API. Real model versions (Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.6 / Sonnet 4.6 / 4.5 / Haiku 4.5). No proxy, no pooling, no token dilution.
landing.feat2Desc: Auto-switch to backup channel within 100ms when primary goes down. Never let API outages stop your business.
landing.feat3Desc: Tag each API key with project name + monthly budget. CSV export with cost, model, IP, balance after — accounting made easy.
landing.feat4Desc: Real-time balance sync + full DB audit log. Every charge is traceable. Your funds are safe.
landing.pricingSub: Pay only for what you use, no hidden fees
landing.starterF2: ✓ Recharge to use, no monthly fee
landing.pricingNote: 💡 Beta pricing: Opus 4.x ¥21.6/M · Sonnet 4.x ¥12.96/M · Haiku 4.5 ¥3.456/M input · 0.6x markup
landing.compareSub: Why B2B cannot rely on cheap gray-market channels
landing.faqA1: Sign up, top up via redeem code, then create an API key in the dashboard. Whole process under 5 minutes — no overseas credit card needed.
landing.faqA2Pre: Our markup is 0.6x (lower than official). Gray-market usually uses reverse-proxied Pro accounts or shared accounts with inflated tokens, with disappearance risk. Our edge is being
landing.faqA2Post: . Welcome to try us during beta.
landing.faqA3: Buy a redeem code on Xianyu (Chinese marketplace), then enter it on the Recharge page. Instant credit. Tiers: ¥100 / ¥300 / ¥500 / ¥1000 / ¥3000.
landing.faqA4: Currently: Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.6 / Sonnet 4.6 / 4.5 / Haiku 4.5. New models will be added following Anthropic's release schedule.
landing.faqA5Pre: Fully compatible with OpenAI SDK format (i.e.
landing.faqA5Post: endpoint). Existing code only needs base_url and api_key changes.
landing.faqA6: Regular top-up is pay-as-you-go for light use. Membership unlocks higher RPM/TPM limits and more API keys — for teams with batch requests.
landing.ctaBottomSub: Sign up to receive trial credit. No credit card required.

apiDocs.overviewDesc: This platform provides API forwarding for the Claude model family with OpenAI SDK-compatible interfaces. You can call Claude models via the OpenAI SDK or direct HTTP requests without changing existing code.
apiDocs.authDesc: All API requests must include the API Key in the HTTP header:
apiDocs.authTip: You can create and manage your API Key on the "API Keys" page.
apiDocs.streamDesc: Add stream: true to enable SSE streaming responses.
apiDocs.modelListDesc: Returns the list of available models in OpenAI-compatible format.
apiDocs.billLi1: All prices are in CNY, charged per 1,000 tokens
apiDocs.billLi2: Actual cost = (input_tokens/1000 × input_price + output_tokens/1000 × output_price) × multiplier
apiDocs.billLi3: See the "Models & Pricing" page for specific model prices and multipliers
apiDocs.billLi4: Returns 402 Payment Required when balance is insufficient
apiDocs.billLi5: Usage records can be viewed in real time and exported as CSV on the "Bill Details" page

legal.termsBody:
TransitAI Terms of Service

Last updated: April 2026

Welcome to TransitAI (the "Platform"). Please read and fully understand these Terms before using the Platform. By registering or using any service, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to be bound by these Terms in their entirety.

1. Service Description

The Platform provides API forwarding services for large language models including Anthropic Claude. The API is compatible with the OpenAI SDK, so you can call supported models using standard clients.

2. Account Registration and Use

1. You must register with a real, valid email address and are responsible for keeping your password secure.

2. You may not transfer or lend your account or API Keys to third parties. You are solely responsible for any losses resulting from unauthorized use of your account.

3. The Platform reserves the right to restrict, suspend, or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.

3. Billing and Price Transparency

1. All models are billed by actual token usage, priced in CNY.

2. The Platform uses transparent multiplier pricing. The multiplier for each model is publicly listed on the "Models & Pricing" page.

3. Whatever model you request is the model that gets called. The Platform does not silently substitute models behind the scenes.

4. When your balance is insufficient, requests will return a 402 Payment Required error.

4. Recharge and Refunds

1. Recharged amounts are credited to your account balance immediately and processed through compliant payment channels such as Alipay.

2. Recharged balances are generally non-refundable. If a refund is necessary, please contact our support email with details.

3. The Platform reserves the right to handle long-dormant balances in accordance with applicable law.

5. Acceptable Use

1. You must not use the Platform for any activity that violates the laws and regulations of the People's Republic of China, including but not limited to generating illegal content, cyberattacks, or fraud.

2. You must comply with the terms of upstream providers (e.g. Anthropic). The Platform assumes you have lawful authorization to use such services.

3. You may not use the Platform's API for: automated mass registration, fraud / chargeback abuse, circumventing content moderation, or generating pornographic, violent, terrorist, or otherwise illegal content.

4. Upon discovery of any violation, the Platform may immediately suspend service, withhold any remaining balance, and reserves the right to pursue legal action.

6. Risk Control

The Platform applies rate limiting, anomaly alerts, and similar protections against abnormal requests (high-frequency abuse, stolen-card transactions, etc.). If your legitimate request is blocked by these systems, please contact support.

7. Limitation of Liability

1. The availability, response quality, and latency of upstream model services are not entirely within the Platform's control.

2. The Platform is not liable for service interruptions caused by force majeure (natural disasters, network failures, policy changes, etc.).

3. The Platform makes no warranty regarding model outputs. You are responsible for how you use such outputs.

8. Changes to These Terms

The Platform may revise these Terms in response to legal or service changes. Revised Terms will be posted on the website, and continued use constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

9. Contact

For questions, contact us via in-site feedback or email sixweisix{'@'}gmail.com.
legal.privacyBody:
TransitAI Privacy Policy

Last updated: April 2026

The Platform takes user privacy seriously. This Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information.

1. Information We Collect

1. Account information: email address and a hashed (encrypted) password.

2. Usage logs: API request timestamps, model name, token usage, status codes, IP address, request latency, and similar technical data.

3. Payment information: recharge amounts, order IDs, payment method, and payment status. We do not store your bank card numbers or payment passwords.

2. About Conversation Content

1. The conversation content (messages) you submit through the API is forwarded in real time to the upstream model provider (e.g. Anthropic).

2. The Platform strictly prohibits selling or sharing user conversation content with third parties for model training purposes.

3. For troubleshooting purposes, some metadata (not full conversation content) is retained for up to 90 days.

3. How We Use Information

1. To provide and maintain the service (authentication, billing, rate limiting).

2. To improve service quality and perform statistical analysis.

3. To respond to lawful requests from law enforcement or judicial authorities when required.

4. Information Security

1. We use HTTPS for transport encryption, hashed password storage, one-way hashed API Keys, and similar security measures.

2. Servers are hosted with compliant cloud providers, and databases are backed up regularly.

3. While we apply reasonable measures to protect your information, please understand that no internet transmission can be 100% secure.

5. Cookies and Local Storage

The Platform uses localStorage to store login tokens (JWTs) for session continuity. Tokens are cleared on logout.

6. Minors

The Platform does not provide services to minors under the age of 14. If you become aware that a minor has registered without guardian consent, please contact us to have the account removed.

7. Your Rights

You have the right at any time to:

1. View your account information and billing history.

2. Change your password or delete your account.

3. Contact us via email to request export or deletion of your personal data.

8. Policy Changes

If we make material changes to this Policy, we will notify you via in-site notification or email. Continued use constitutes acceptance of the updated Policy.

9. Contact

Email: sixweisix{'@'}gmail.com
